macro.title: Housing Market Spotlight: Lower-priced metros show greater resilience as demand softens
macro.what: HousingWire Data reveals how elevated mortgage rates are reshaping local housing markets, with more affordable metros proving more resilient.

macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.
